text: 👋 Los patrones en cuña son una herramienta poderosa en el análisis técnico que puede darte una idea de los posibles movimientos de los precios.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Tanto si detectas una cuña descendente como si detectas una ascendente, estas formaciones pueden revelar señales clave sobre la dirección del mercado.

text: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña?
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Un patrón de cuña se forma cuando el precio se mueve entre dos líneas de tendencia convergentes, creando una forma similar a un triángulo.

text: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña?
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Un patrón de cuña se forma cuando el precio se mueve entre dos líneas de tendencia convergentes, creando una forma similar a un triángulo.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Estos patrones suelen aparecer cuando el mercado se ralentiza o se consolida antes de un movimiento más importante.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Las cuñas pueden inclinarse hacia arriba o hacia abajo, y la diferencia clave radica en si las líneas de tendencia convergen hacia una tendencia alcista (cuña ascendente) o hacia una tendencia bajista (cuña descendente).
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Patrón de cuña descendente: reversión alcista 📈 El patrón de cuña descendente es una señal de reversión alcista.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Esta formación se produce cuando el precio se mueve entre dos líneas de tendencia descendentes, generando una serie de máximos y mínimos cada vez más bajos.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: El impulso bajista se debilita a medida que las líneas de tendencia convergen, lo que indica que los vendedores están perdiendo fuerza, lo que crea el potencial para una ruptura alcista.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Cómo comerciar con la cuña descendente Entrada: Espera a que el precio rompa por encima de la línea de tendencia superior.
symbol_context: ¿Qué es un patrón de cuña? para WHITEBIT:BTCUSDT de WhiteBIT

text: Esta es tu señal para entrar en largo.

text: From an Elliott Wave perspective, the move can still be interpreted as an extended wave C.

text: However, the structure appears incomplete, as five distinct subwaves have yet to fully develop.

text: This suggests that the current decline may extend further before reaching a meaningful bottom.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: Looking ahead, key retracement levels come into focus.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: The 0.618 Fibonacci retracement near 193 and the 0.786 level around 178 represent potential downside targets.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: These zones could gradually form a more attractive support area where a rebound may develop.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: That said, bearish momentum remains firmly in control.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: Highlights:.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: Wave C breakdown below corrective channel confirms weakness.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: 193–178 area can be attractive for a rebound
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: AUDUSD has reversed sharply to the downside into the end of the week, with price action increasingly driven by broad-based US dollar strength.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: The recent shift in momentum suggests that the prior upside move was temporary, with sellers now regaining control.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: From an Elliott Wave perspective, the internal structure supports this bearish turn.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: The recovery from the 0.6947 low unfolded in three waves, indicating that the move was corrective rather than impulsive.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: This strongly suggests it was a wave B, rather than the start of a sustained bullish trend.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: The brief push to new highs now appears to have been a false breakout, followed by a sharp reversal lower.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: This type of price action fits well with the idea of an irregular correction, where wave B exceeds the origin of wave A before the market resumes to the downside.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: As a result, the broader structure may still be developing as a wave four correction, but one that is more complex than initially expected.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: If this scenario plays out, the correction could take the form of a triangle or a flat pattern.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: In either case, attention should be placed on potential support zones that may come into play once the structure matures—particularly after a possible wave E in a triangle scenario.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: Key levels to watch include the previous wave A swing low around 0.6947, followed by the 0.6900 psychological level.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: This area is further supported by the presence of a prior wave four of a lesser degree, making it a technically significant support zone.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: Despite the current downside pressure, this zone could attract buyers and stabilize price action, potentially still within this month.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

text: From a fundamental perspective, a relatively hawkish stance from the Reserve Bank of Australia due to persistent inflation concerns could continue to support the Australian dollar and help maintain the broader uptrend once this corrective phase is complete.
symbol_context: Amazon Breakdown Signals Further Downside Before Key Support for NASDAQ:AMZN by ew-forecast

symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: 4)However, make it a habit to set a break-even point or move your stop-loss into a positive zone when the trade is going well.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: This will prevent losses or even guarantee your profit, or simply close your position without waiting for the take-profit level if you are satisfied with the profit.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: 5)Don't forget, above all: always be risk and money management Invest what you can afford to lose, which is between 1% and 5% of your margin.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: 6) Roddy01, the trading soldier says: In trading you need: experience hopefulness patience Having good indicators allows you to be free and autonomous and not dependent on signals 7) Consider also investing in and taking a course through fbk, tgrm, or istgrm.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: You will gain a better understanding of trading and signals, and you will be free and independent in your decisions to open and close positions.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: 8) I'd like to point out that I primarily trade with 20x leverage (However, you can use the leverage that suits your plan or your psychological state as a trader), and my tp1 (Target 1) is placed 2.5% from the entry point and 2.5% from each other.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: I'd also like to point out that my stop-loss (SL) is also 2.5% from the entry point.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: Therefore, we will lose 50% of our margin if the stop-loss is triggered, and we will gain 50% at tp1 (Target 1), 100% at tp2 (Target 2), and 150% at tp3 (Target 3) if the trade is successful.
symbol_context: Avaxusdt long for BYBIT:AVAXUSDT.P by RODDYTRADING

text: Good luck to us all Thank you.

text: What’s CHoCH in plain English?
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: If trend is just “higher highs / higher lows” or “lower highs / lower lows” then CHoCH is the first clean moment when price says: “Yo, I’m not behaving like before.” Downtrend example on an alt: - Lower high - Lower low - Lower high - Lower low All good, bears are cruising.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Then suddenly: - Price makes a low - Bounces - Comes back… but fails to make a new low - Instead, it breaks above the last lower high That break above the last lower high – that’s your CHoCH.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: CHoCH lets you: - See the first sign that sellers are losing control - Shift from full-on bearish bias to “ok, maybe rotation coming” - Start stalking long setups instead of shorting into the floor I’m not saying “buy every CHoCH”.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: I’m saying: “stop fading moves when structure tells you the party changed.” How I actually use CHoCH On alts, I mainly watch 1h and 4h.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Lower than that, it’s mostly noise and pain.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Basic flow for a bearish-to-bullish CHoCH: 1) Identify clear downtrend: obvious lower highs & lower lows.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: 2) Wait for price to form a low, then a bounce (a swing high).
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: 3) Price revisits the lows but: - either makes a slightly higher low - or double-bottoms and launches 4) Key moment: price breaks above that “swing high” that formed on the bounce.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: That break = CHoCH.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Downtrend behavior is broken.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: After CHoCH, I’m not instantly ape-long.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: CHoCH is the first visual clue they’re losing that fight.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: You need: - A clear prior trend - A proper swing high/swing low - Then a clean break of that swing 2) Forcing it on choppy ranges If price is just sideways, there’s no “character” to change.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: It’s just noise.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: 3) Treating CHoCH as 100% reversal confirmation It’s an early signal, not a holy grail.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Maybe I’m wrong, but if you think one broken high = “new bull market”, the market will gladly educate you.
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: How CHoCH helps your trading psychology The real win isn’t just “better entries”, it’s less emotional guessing.

text: Instead of: - “Is this the bottom?
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: What if I miss it?” You switch to: - “Has structure changed?
symbol_context: stop guessing reversals: master CHoCH for altcoin clarity for CRYPTOCAP:BTC.D by Trade_Logic_AI

text: Yes/No.” It turns: - FOMO into a checklist - Panic into a plan - Gut feelings into visual, repeatable signals You stop buying every dip and shorting every rip, and start reacting to actual behavior shifts.

text: Market makers tend to condition traders to act in certain ways over time and once vigilance …
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: Just a short update with possible scenario After two failed attempts to break out the local descending channel, the price dropped by approximately 37% from the latest peak and around 26% from the most recent wick into the support zone.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: If this pattern repeats again, the price could potentially move down toward 50k USD.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: Of course, you shouldn’t expect Bitcoin to reach a marked level perfectly.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: Market makers tend to condition traders to act in certain ways over time and once vigilance drops, things often move against expectations.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: That’s why I always say - be cautious with futures trading.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: You need to have a Plan B and be prepared for scenarios where the market doesn’t follow your initial assumptions.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: If you look at Bitcoin from the very first cycles - you will see that the behavior is surprisingly consistent Every time price reaches the area between the red and purple arcs - it has historically marked a cycle top.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: After that we always saw a brutal correction — roughly 80% drawdown.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: No exceptions so far Another interesting detail: the time from one ATH to the next ATH has been very similar each cycle, around 1,491 days.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: After each major bottom price didn’t just bounce — it built a cup-shaped structure, slowly accumulating before the next expansion At the same time every cycle produced higher lows almost like steps going up (levels 1–5) So!
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: If we get a deep correction - the next major bottom could land around $29k–$39k If the correction is less severe - support shifts higher to $39k–$51k Additionally, price may first return to the previous ATH - similar to what was in 2021, potentially pushing slightly above it.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: This would be consistent with historical behavior, where prior ATH are often reclaimed or marginally exceeded before a larger macro pullback unfolds.
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: If the current cup plays out the same way it did in previous cycles, the measured move points to a potential Bitcoin price around $361k at the next ATH No indicators, no hype — just repeating structure, time symmetry and proportional moves that Bitcoin has respected for years
symbol_context: BTCUSD 1D – Local Trend: The Road to 50K? for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by OpenYourMind1318

text: Everything is just 0s and 1s This chart is meant to simplify the Elliott Wave Theory and project future price estimates.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: Starting with the 4 Year cycle we can see that it'll be there forever simply because its the universal law on how everything works.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: The Fibonaccian spiral, Fractals, and so on.

text: Perhaps those systems dont call for the universal law.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: The (0) 1 - 2 - 3 Pattern Going back to the first Gen adopters of Bitcoin price created this 3 - Drive Impulse pattern which kept the lower trendline intact and the upper trendline as well until we saw a break below that would have been the 3rd touch to send price even higher.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: This alone tells me we had some type of reset, this is where '0' comes back into play starting the whole '3 Drive - Impulse' all over again.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: Today we're back at '3' and price is crashing while standing at 4 years again.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: The lower trendline doesn't look like it'll hold, and its very important that it does if you want to see a blow off top this year.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: Also not considering ALTs like NASDAQ:RAY and CRYPTOCAP:SOL had major structural damage.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: Hypothetically lets say price breaks below and we land somewhere near $30k.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: At this point the pattern has come to a reset and we do it all over again.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: 0, 1, 2, 3 If this does play out, on a realistic point I could see a price target of around $300k - $500k by 2030 And maybe $800k - $1M by 2034.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: A lengthening cycle like this will shake out people who keep buying tops and quitting at bottoms.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: Real players will be well rewarded for another decade/4yr cycle to come.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: This is just a theory and will only be proven when time tells.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19

text: The main focus is to navigate whats already in front of us.
symbol_context: Bitcoin | Continuation Down for BITSTAMP:BTCUSD by Nathanl19
